nodes.speaker: Tev - Translating
lines: ...Heh. Sorry. Couldn't resist. You should see your face.
Anyway. Wanna help me smuggle some alien goodies?

nodes.speaker: Tev - Translating
lines: Space dust. A whole crate of it. And before you ask — it's not ILLEGAL illegal. It's more of a paperwork situation.
Buyer's on Fiery Twin. I can't fly. You can. We split the take.

nodes.speaker: Tev - Translating
lines: Crate's already in the back. Don't ask how long it's been there.
Take us up, keep it casual, and whatever happens out there — do NOT be weird.

nodes.speaker: Tev - Translating
lines: Me and the crate will be right here. Being patient. And extremely legal.
